title: Browan Ingestion Request Contract
description: Standard JSON body sent from LoRa Network Server (LNS) representing pre-decoded Browan sound level telemetry.

device_id.description: Unique hardware EUI of the Browan device.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the measurement.

sound_level.description: Instantaneous sound intensity level in decibels (dB).
